---
title: "PET-PEESE model"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{pet-peese}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Introduction

PET-PEESE is a regression-based method for correcting small-study effects.

## PET

Regression of test statistics on precision:

\[
t_i = \alpha + \beta \frac{1}{SE_i} + u_i
\]

## PEESE

Regression of effect size on squared standard error:

\[
y_i = \alpha + \beta SE_i^2 + u_i
\]

### Interpretation

The intercept estimates the effect as precision approaches infinity.
